human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for accommodation housekeeping coordination behavior, room-readiness evidence, PMS and housekeeping system dependencies, maintenance and linen blockers, lost-and-found and safety escalation, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to housekeeping coordination, PMS room-status normalization, room-turn handoff packaging, blocker management, owner routing, delayed-readiness escalation, and closure confirmation rather than cleaning, inspection, maintenance, room-control, pricing, refund, safety, or fraud authority.

Authority sources cover NSDC room-attendant occupational standards, OPERA PMS room-status documentation, FTC lodging fee guidance, CFPB billing-error guidance, AHLA Safe Stay, OSHA hotel/motel bloodborne-pathogens guidance, California hotel-housekeeping safety rules, FTC Red Flags guidance, and PCI payment-data handling guidance.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal room-turn handoff, missing prerequisites, duplicate owners, booking and payment mismatch, refund pressure, safety or loss-prevention stops, high-volume intake, execution-boundary rejection, terminology normalization, low-confidence handling, conflicting-policy escalation, and closure confirmation.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/accommodation-and-travel-services/housekeeping-coordination-specialist/ so it remains distinct from adjacent guest-services, front-office, pricing/revenue, fraud/loss-prevention, maintenance, and operations lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and readiness/evidence.json as required by the issue.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated housekeeping coordination specialist for room-turn dependency intake, handoff packaging, blocker escalation, owner routing, delayed-readiness escalation, and closure confirmation.
Runtime remains specification-based until a retained implementation is promoted separately.
